ToursPage.title: Our Tour Packages
ToursPage.description: Explore our selection of unique experiences. From archaeological adventures to luxury getaways, we have the perfect trip for you.
ToursPage.emptyDesc: We are designing new experiences for this region. Come back soon!

FlightsPage.title: Flight Offers
FlightsPage.description: Promotional fares with limited seats. Find your destination and book instantly via WhatsApp.
FlightsPage.emptyDesc: No offers available in this category at the moment.

OffersPage.title: Exclusive Offers
OffersPage.description: Take advantage of our limited-time discounts. The best experiences at the best price, always maintaining our premium quality.
OffersPage.emptyDesc: Our discounted spots flew away. Come back soon to discover new promotions or visit our regular packages.

HomePage.emptyTour: No packages available yet. We are preparing new adventures!

ValueProposition.title: Why travel with Continents?
ValueProposition.description: We turn your dream vacation into a hassle-free reality, backed by true tourism experts.

benefits.localExpertsDesc: Passionate native guides eager to show you the best-kept secrets of each destination.
benefits.safeTravelDesc: 24/7 assistance and safety protocols so you only worry about enjoying yourself.
benefits.premiumDesc: We select the best hotels and services to ensure your maximum comfort.

Newsletter.title: Join our traveler's club
